race.comment: MANAAL (1) class mare who gave some of these weight when a convincing winner of the G2 Golden Pendant over this trip at Rosehill last September. Carried the 59.5kg with a solid first-up second over 1200m in the G3 Triscay Stakes at this track. Second-up record is impressive and will take holding out. GERRINGONG (5) likely leader who will appreciate the services of Rawiller second-up from the low draw. Taken back from the wide gate on resumption with a battling seventh over 1200m in the G3 Triscay Stakes. Leading player who will prove hard to get past. JENNI THE FOX (7) Victorian mare in good order. Sent north with a tough on-pace second over 1300m in the MM F&Ms at the Gold Coast behind Poster Girl. Kept ticking over with a 1050m trial at Randwick. Yet to win past 1300m and must be kept safe. VERONA ROSE (4) eye-catching return when third over the unsuitable 1200m at this track. Will need a fast tempo if she's to have any hope. FIRESTORM (3) will be closing late.
